subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to identify publishers with declining quarterly revenue/spend trends across Q1-Q4 2024. Calculate quarter-over-quarter changes and trend direction for each publisher.

Reconcile the declining trend data with publisher contract state (MongoDB), current contract terms, and historical performance metrics. Classify renewal posture and generate hold/expand/reduce recommendations for each publisher based on trend severity, contract value, and strategic importance.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks with minimal split: (1) sql_gen (mid tier) to fetch 2024 quarterly data and compute trends — this requires multi-quarter aggregation with QoQ calculations, justifying mid over small. (2) cross_recon (mid tier) to reconcile SQL trends with MongoDB contract state and generate recommendations — mid tier sufficient because the recommendation logic (hold/expand/reduce) is rule-based classification against trend severity and contract context, not multi-signal probabilistic inference. No separate policy_action subtask needed; recommendations are part of the reconciliation logic, not governance policy evaluation. No extract subtask needed as the output is structured metrics and recommendations, not document field extraction.

output.sql: WITH quarterly_revenue AS (SELECT publisher, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) as quarterly_revenue FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY publisher, fiscal_quarter), revenue_ranked AS (SELECT publisher, fiscal_quarter, quarterly_revenue, LAG(quarterly_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY publisher ORDER BY fiscal_quarter) as prev_quarter_revenue FROM quarterly_revenue), qoq_changes AS (SELECT publisher, fiscal_quarter, quarterly_revenue, prev_quarter_revenue, CASE WHEN prev_quarter_revenue IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ((quarterly_revenue - prev_quarter_revenue) / prev_quarter_revenue * 100) END as qoq_pct_change FROM revenue_ranked), declining_publishers AS (SELECT publisher, fiscal_quarter, quarterly_revenue, qoq_pct_change, COUNT(CASE WHEN qoq_pct_change < 0 THEN 1 END) OVER (PARTITION BY publisher) as declining_quarters FROM qoq_changes WHERE fiscal_quarter IN (1, 2, 3, 4)), publisher_trend AS (SELECT DISTINCT publisher, SUM(CASE WHEN qoq_pct_change < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_declining_quarters, AVG(qoq_pct_change) as avg_qoq_change, MIN(qoq_pct_change) as min_qoq_change, SUM(quarterly_revenue) as annual_revenue FROM qoq_changes WHERE fiscal_quarter IN (1, 2, 3, 4) GROUP BY publisher HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN qoq_pct_change < 0 THEN 1 END) >= 2) SELECT publisher, total_declining_quarters, ROUND(avg_qoq_change::NUMERIC, 2) as avg_qoq_pct_change, ROUND(min_qoq_change::NUMERIC, 2) as worst_qoq_pct_change, ROUND(annual_revenue::NUMERIC, 2) as total_2024_revenue, CASE WHEN total_declining_quarters >= 3 THEN 'REDUCE' WHEN total_declining_quarters = 2 AND avg_qoq_change < -10 THEN 'REDUCE' WHEN total_declining_quarters = 2 THEN 'HOLD' ELSE 'HOLD' END as renewal_recommendation FROM publisher_trend ORDER BY avg_qoq_change ASC

reconciled.note: No MongoDB publisher contract state provided in upstream_outputs. Unable to perform LEFT JOIN reconciliation as specified. SQL trend analysis alone available.

reconciled.detail: MongoDB operational state (publisher contract terms, strategic importance, contract value) required but not provided in upstream_outputs

required_inputs_missing: MongoDB publisher contract collection (contract_state, renewal_date, contract_value, strategic_tier)
available_inputs: SQL declining trend analysis with 2024 quarterly revenue changes and renewal recommendations
execution_notes.recommendation: Provide MongoDB query output with publisher contract state to complete LEFT JOIN reconciliation and generate hold/expand/reduce posture classification
